case_title: HEATHER ROSNOW VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: OBJECTION PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 6.1 (C) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO, CLERK A. HUIE, REPORTER ROBERT BALIAN. MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-01-2003 IN DEPT. 206, MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL -- GRANTED, TRIAL DATE CONTINUED FROM NOV-17-03 TO JUL-19-04. MANDATORY SETT CONF OF OCT-30-03 VACATED AND TO BE RESET, PENDING WRITTEN ORDER.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 11/05/04. RULING: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED; IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. DEFENDANT IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN; REPORTER: CHRISTINE PAXTON, CSR 1558
